title: Minimum Time to Remove All Cars Containing Illegal Goods
titleCn: 移除所有载有违禁货物车厢所需的最少时间

testcases.input: s = "1100101" Output: 5 Explanation: One way to remove all the cars containing illegal goods from the sequence is to - remove a car from the left end 2 times. Time taken is 2 * 1 = 2. - remove a car from the right end. Time taken is 1. - remove the car containing illegal goods found in the middle. Time taken is 2. This obtains a total time of 2 + 1 + 2 = 5. An alternative way is to - remove a car from the left end 2 times. Time taken is 2 * 1 = 2. - remove a car from the right end 3 times. Time taken is 3 * 1 = 3. This also obtains a total time of 2 + 3 = 5. 5 is the minimum time taken to remove all the cars containing illegal goods. There are no other ways to remove them with less time.
